chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory on the Muhrim for the Various Types of Game He Injures

text: 2734 - أَنَّ أَبَا اَلْحَسَنِ اَلثَّانِيَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «يَذْبَحُ اَلصَّيْدَ وَ يَأْكُلُهُ وَ يَفْدِي أَحَبُّ إِلَيَّ مِنَ اَلْمَيْتَةِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2734 - Abu Ja'far al-Thani, Imam Muhammad al-Jawad (as) said:
"Slaughtering the game, eating it, and paying the expiation is more beloved to me than eating carrion."
